name: Silver Tongue

sourceReferences.note: Tasha's Cauldron of Everything / Mythic Odysseys of Theros

rulesText.description: College of Eloquence-style feature. For Deception and Persuasion, d20 rolls of 9 or lower count as 10. This is a d20 floor of 10. Does not apply against player character Insight checks.
